title: Canonicalizer crash on invalid -> wire -> strictconnect w/vector type
body:
Using this example `vector-invalid.fir`:
```scala
circuit vinvalid:
  module vinvalid:
    output a: UInt<5>[3]

    wire b: UInt<5>[3]
    b is invalid
    a <- b
```
Command:
```console
$ firtool --parse-only vector-invalid.fir | circt-opt --canonicalize
```

<details>
<summary>Backtrace</summary>

```
circt-opt: /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/mlir/include/mlir/IR/Types.h:251: U mlir::Type::cast() const [U = circt::firrtl::IntType]: Assertion `isa<U>()' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace.
```
